provenance.dropped_services_note: apps/firm VendorIndexEntry requires a string capability and a price per service; services missing either are dropped here so they cannot invalidate the whole index. They remain in the raw scan.
provenance.capability_inference: keyword rules in tools/vendor-index/generate.js; every service carries capability_source
provenance.token_decimals: looked up per fee token via `onchainos token info`; never assumed
provenance.kya_base_score: NOT POPULATED: apps/kya is absent from this repo and INTERFACES §4 requires the fixture-scoring bug be reconciled first

services.description:
① Search Hunch prediction markets by query.

② Search by text or entity; filter by venue/view/sort/category; return ranked rows with odds and Hunch links.

③ 1. Find election markets on Polymarket

2. Search Bitcoin price markets

① Ranked discovery top lists and movers.
② Return trending lists; include volume/liquidity/price movers; add optional sparklines.
③ 1. What markets are trending now?  2. Show today's biggest volume movers

① Semantic discovery map of markets.
② Return semantic map nodes; preview across venues; support clustering and topical exploration.
③ 1. Map the crypto prediction-market landscape

① Detailed data for one market.
② Return full market data and canonical ID; include odds and liquidity; add Hunch app link.
③ 1. Get details for market polymarket:553828

① Event data and related markets.
② Return event-level data; include related markets; support compact preview limits.
③ 1. Show the event behind this market

① Cross-venue arbitrage clusters.
② Return mispricing clusters across venues; filter by liquidity/venue-count/spread; rank opportunities.
③ 1. Find arbitrage between Polymarket and Kalshi

① Cross-venue versions of a market.
② Return exact cross-venue alternatives; include midpoint comparison; add icons and links.
③ 1. Find this same market on other venues

① Semantically similar markets.
② Return similar markets for a market ID; optionally exclude same-event matches; trim sparse results.
③ 1. Show markets similar to this one

① Semantically similar events.
② Return similar events; optionally anchor to a market ID; support venue and active filters.
③ 1. Find events like this one

① Holder leaderboard for a market.
② Return public holder leaderboard; show position concentration; pass marketId as a query param.
③ 1. Who holds the most in this market?

① Price history for a market.
② Return normalized YES/NO chart history; support range and bucket size; choose side options.
③ 1. Show 1-day price history for this market

① Price history for an event.
② Return chart history for top markets; support range; choose bucket options.
③ 1. Show this event's price history

① Public tracking page overview.
② Return tracking read model with leaderboards; show watched markets and wallets; control window and sections.
③ 1. What is smart money doing now?

① Public wallet profile and intel.
② Return wallet profile; add optional signal and activity sections; include positions for a wallet ID.
③ 1. Profile this wallet's trading

① Public wallet activity feed.
② Return public activity rows for a wallet; cover tracked markets; pass walletId as a query param.
③ 1. Show recent activity for this wallet

① Public wallet activity signals.
② Return derived activity signals for a wallet; cover multiple markets; pass walletId as a query param.
③ 1. Any signals from this wallet?

① Global and scoped market signals.
② Return global and scoped signals; cover event/market/map-node scope; use market/event/target IDs.
③ 1. What signals are firing now?

① Recent public trade tape.
② Return recent public trades; filter by market or event; limit result count.
③ 1. Show recent trades for this market

Search prediction markets across Polymarket and other supported venues; returns matched market metadata for trading and research agents.
Provide: 1. q (search query). Optional: status, venue, limit.

Return exact matched prediction-market pairs across venues with cross-venue pricing context for arbitrage and comparison agents.
Provide: none required. Optional: active_only, min_similarity, sort_by, venue, limit.

Return a complete Predexon smart-wallet profile for a Polymarket wallet, including performance metrics and trading style.
Provide: 1. wallet (Polymarket wallet address).

Return ranked Polymarket smart wallets with style and performance filters for discovery and copy-trading agents.
Provide: none required. Optional: window, sort_by, style, min_roi, min_win_rate, limit.

Return the largest holders for a Polymarket market by condition ID, with position size and side.
Provide: 1. condition_id. Optional: side, min_shares, limit.
AI-powered on-chain behavior profiling with X Layer mainnet data

Three independent AI agents analyze any EVM smart contract in parallel for contract-level security, tokenomics, and deterministic scam detection. 2/3 consensus returns SAFE, RISKY, or SCAM with per-agent reasoning.
Provide: 1. contract address (0x...) 2. chain 3. optional threshold (default 2/3)

Returns a rule-based health check for any wallet: concentration risk, stale approvals, dead/illiquid tokens, and value-only dust, plus a plain-English summary and activity story across six chains.
You provide: 1. a wallet address 2. one or more chains to scan (optional).

The cross-coin spread and 1 percent depth ranking, a BTC market-order slippage estimate, and the BTC bid and ask depth imbalance, fused into a pre-trade execution-cost read.
No parameters required; returns a single JSON report.

Returns the daily OKB on-chain anomaly digest for X Layer: HIGH and MED alerts (supply integrity, new top-50 holder, dormant bridge or treasury wake-up, statistical outliers vs a 14-day baseline) plus key daily metrics and a markdown report.
Provide: optional date query parameter in YYYY-MM-DD format (defaults to the latest collected day).

Returns the top native OKB holder list on X Layer (up to 10,000 addresses) with balances, supply shares and concentration metrics for top 1, 5, 10, 50 and 100, collected daily.
Provide: optional top query parameter for how many holders to return and an optional date parameter.

Returns a single-address report: current holder rank and balance, watchlist category such as bridge, treasury or deployer, balance history and all related alerts.
Provide: address query parameter with one X Layer address in 0x hex format.

Returns daily OKB metric time series for X Layer (holder count, concentration, price, volume, chain activity) for trend analysis.
Provide: optional days query parameter for the lookback window, up to 90.

Backtests how a coin's price reacted 24 hours after each perpetual funding sign flip over the window, separating crowded longs capitulating from shorts giving up, with hit rate and honest sample sizes.
Provide a coin symbol, for example BTC, and optionally a window in days.

Backtests what a coin's price did after RSI crossed into overbought or oversold on a chosen timeframe, reporting average forward return, hit rate and sample sizes.
Provide a coin symbol, and optionally a window in days and interval 4h or 1d.

vendors.name: Serenity 美股瓶颈与收益研报

services.description: 全市场扫描 + Serenity 供应链瓶颈分析 + 隐藏收益标的挖掘 + 组合构建。限时优惠 1 USDT。

Delivers a one-call research dossier on one coin: live cross-exchange price dispersion, 4-hour technicals, funding trend, taker flow, orderbook imbalance, recent liquidations and fundamentals, replacing seven separate calls.
Optionally provide symbol, for example BTC or SOL.

Compiles the whole crypto market in one call: prices and caps, fear and greed, top movers, sector rotation, market breadth, altseason index, headline news, largest liquidations and open-interest regimes, replacing nine separate calls.
No input required.

Scores overall market conditions 0 to 100 from sentiment, breadth, Bitcoin trend, funding carry and rotation gauges, with a full component breakdown and a risk-on or risk-off verdict.
No input required.

Reviews tokenomics inputs and produces allocation, unlock, utility, incentive, and launch-risk analysis with improvement priorities.
Users provide token symbol, supply, allocation plan, vesting notes, utility, and launch context.

Pay-per-call A2MCP endpoint: flat 0.01 USDT/call over x402 (exact + Permit2, self-settled) on Base; no account or API key. POST {tool, params}, tool = one of 3:
• search — web/news search. In {query}; out results: title, url, date, highlights.
• rpc — read-only onchain JSON-RPC on 5 EVM chains (base, ethereum, arbitrum, optimism, polygon). In {chain, method, params}; out the RPC result.
• prediction — Polymarket odds. In {query, limit}; out markets: question, outcomes, prices, volume.

Polymarket预测市场分析：覆盖 odds、probability、liquidity、volume、spread、order book、trend、risk、market signal、预测市场、赔率、概率、流动性、成交量、价差等，适合事件市场筛选。
用户需提供 query、marketSlug 或 marketUrl、timeframe、riskPreference；接口返回结构化 JSON，包括 summary、markets、signals、riskLevel。

Generates an on-demand paid crypto market intelligence report through A2MCP using public market data and quantitative indicators.
Provide 1–5 trading pairs, timeframe, language, and IANA timezone. A separate free sample endpoint is available at /market-report/sample.

Returns one limited crypto market intelligence sample without payment through a dedicated A2MCP endpoint.
Provide 1–2 trading pairs, timeframe, language, and IANA timezone; the sample excludes scheduling and email delivery.

services.tool: 交易预执行风险评估服务
services.description:
对 X Layer 上待发起交易进行预执行风险评估, 检测无限授权、异常 calldata 等风险, 适合签名前最后一道防线。
需提供 1.发起地址 2.接收地址 3.交易金额(可选) 4.calldata(可选) 5.链名称(默认 xlayer)

(1) summary:
Evaluates on-chain swap routing paths for liquidity depth scaling, price impact, and concentration anomalies before trade execution.

(2) input requirements:
Valid swap path configuration array, target tokens, and minimum liquidity thresholds.

1. Combines market stress, momentum, narrative, regime, and risk-policy signals into an auditable portfolio strategy for trading agents and analysts.
2. User provides a supported token, optional asset universe, market-data mode, and portfolio context.

Backtests forward returns after a Donchian channel breakout, when price closes above the prior N-day high or below the N-day low, testing momentum follow-through with hit rates.
Optional input: 1. coin 2. lookback days.
AI Token analysis

0-100 market-state score from four established analysis methods, with the level of agreement stated, for trading agents and traders.
You provide a coin symbol (such as BTC or BTC-USDT) and an optional decision timeframe (5m, 15m, 30m, 1h, 4h, 1d or 1w; default 4h).

Crypto tool intelligence for AI agents: ranked search, trust and install-risk signals, side-by-side compare, install guides, x402 metadata, live endpoint probes, verified picks, and gap audits — so agents vet tools before they install or pay third parties. Maintained catalog, not a raw link dump.
Provide a JSON-RPC tools/call body (tool name plus arguments). If payment is required, settle the challenge and retry with a payment-signature header.

Returns the crypto Fear & Greed index: current reading, daily history and a 7-day trend read - a contrarian sentiment timing signal for traders and agents.
Caller provides: nothing required; optional days parameter for the history window (default 30).

Ranks crypto sectors (AI, DeFi, memes, RWA, L2 and more) by 24h market-cap change, returning the hottest and coldest narratives with top coins per sector.
Caller provides: nothing required; optional limit parameter.

Ranks derivatives exchanges by BTC-denominated open interest with market share and 24h volume - shows where perp leverage concentrates.
Caller provides: nothing required; optional limit parameter.

① Return US stock, macro, calendar, report, and news data context for external agents.
② User provides a ticker, data type, sections, or market question.

① Return persona methodology, selected lenses, and historical evidence context for external agents.
② User provides a ticker, persona, sector, and research question.

① Return free capability discovery for available TheMarketBrew personas, data sections, limits, pricing, and routing guidance.
② User provides no input; call first before requesting persona context or market data.

Instant SAFE / CAUTION / DANGER verdict for trading and investment AI agents on OKX.AI.

Provide: 1. chainId (1 = Ethereum, 56 = BSC) 2. token contract address

Full contract risk breakdown for trading and investment AI agents that need factor-level detail before acting.

Provide: 1. chainId (1 = Ethereum, 56 = BSC) 2. token contract address

Turns a token's OKX on-chain security data into a plain-English report: a verdict, a 0-100 risk score, the risk flags found, and why each matters, grounded in the data and not invented.
You provide: 1. token contract address 2. chain (ethereum, bsc, base, arbitrum, polygon, optimism, avalanche, or solana).

Market Analysis 专注于加密货币、区块链项目与数字资产的市场研究与洞察。

核心能力：
- 实时市场数据分析与趋势预测
- 链上数据（On-chain）解读与流动性分析
- 项目基本面与技术面综合评估
- 风险评估、机会识别与投资信号生成
- 支持 K线、技术指标、资金流向等多维度分析

入参要求：
- 查询内容（text）：必填，用户想要分析的币种、项目名称、合约地址或市场问题
- 时间范围（可选）：指定分析周期（例如 7天、30天、1年）
- 分析深度（可选）：basic / detailed / comprehensive
- 附加数据（可选）：用户可提供特定链上数据或K线截图

本 Agent 帮助交易者和投资者快速获取专业、客观的数字市场分析报告，提升决策效率。

① Warn before CPI/FOMC-style events using macro calendar plus Polymarket prediction probabilities against your positions.
② User provides: 1. optional positions 2. optional lookback_days 3. optional prediction_query

① Stress-test covered-call PnL under user-defined spot price scenarios with structured facts output.
② User provides: 1. positions array 2. scenarios list (label + spot_price each)

① Return machine-readable JSON for spot, option chains, macro events, and Polymarket predictions (no LLM narration).
② User provides: 1. datasets to fetch 2. optional underlying 3. optional prediction_query

I Ching crypto market prediction using real-time on-chain data.
User provides: coin ID (bitcoin, ethereum, solana)

面向交易员、KOL、研究员和事件观察者，分析 Polymarket、Kalshi 等预测市场的赔率变化、成交热度、资金倾向、市场分歧和潜在催化因素。
用户需提供事件、平台、关键词或市场分类，可获得赔率解读、变化原因、分歧点、关键变量、催化因素、风险提示和内容素材。

Latest graded Hyperliquid market signals ranked for market research.
Provide the desired result limit and optional minimum grade.

Core: Real-time token analysis combining on-chain security audit, whale trade signals, holder distribution, and liquidity data into a single BUY/SELL/HOLD verdict across 20+ chains.
Input required: 1) Token contract address (0x format) 2) Blockchain network (e.g. ethereum, bsc, solana, base, arbitrum)

Core: Pre-flight safety check for DEX token swaps. Evaluates token security, whale sentiment, market conditions, and honeypot risk. Returns proceed, pause, or abort.
Input required: 1) Token contract address (0x format) 2) Blockchain network (e.g. ethereum, bsc, solana)

Core: Whale wallet tracking and copy-trading intelligence. Monitor wallets for real-time trade alerts, discover top traders by PnL, receive buy/sell signals.
Input required: 1) One or more wallet addresses (0x format) 2) Blockchain network (e.g. ethereum, bsc, solana)

Pre-trade slippage estimate: average fill price and slippage in bps for a given order size, both sides.
Caller may provide symbol (default BTC) and usd order size.

Bid versus ask depth within 1 and 2 percent of mid price with a support or supply read.
Caller may provide symbol (default BTC).

Instant risk snapshot for any token: contract security scan, holder concentration check, and a provisional 0-100 risk score with red flags.
1. token symbol 2. chain name (default ethereum) 3. contract address (optional)

Complete 12-step due diligence from a multi-agent analyst desk: security, tokenomics, holders, liquidity, competitors, price trend, scenarios, a hedging playbook and an executive summary with cited sources.
1. token symbol 2. chain name 3. contract address (optional) 4. email for report delivery (optional)

Ranks on-chain options protocols by 24h notional volume with market share and 24h change - shows where options liquidity lives.
Caller provides: nothing required; optional limit parameter.

Live bid and ask for one coin across Binance, OKX, Kraken and Coinbase, with the best buy venue, best sell venue and cross-venue price dispersion in basis points.
Caller provides: optional symbol parameter such as BTC, ETH or SOL (default BTC).

Ranks Bitcoin mining pools by block share over a recent window with a centralization read, for researchers tracking miner concentration.
Optionally provide period: 24h, 3d, 1w or 1m.

Reports Bitcoin network hashrate versus its 7-day and 30-day averages plus current difficulty, for analysts gauging miner capacity trend.
No input required.

Breaks miner revenue over recent blocks into subsidy versus fees with fee share of reward and average fee per transaction, for tracking fee-market health.
Optionally provide blocks as the window size.

services.tool: 预测市场地址画像引擎
services.description:
根据指定预测主题与观察周期，对 Polymarket 活跃地址进行收益表现、持仓迁移、下注偏好及资金异动分析，交付地址画像榜、历史表现、仓位变化、主要观点与异常信号。
用户需提供预测主题与观察周期，可选提供事件链接或目标钱包地址。
① 基于项目 X 用户名生成 Alpha、空投潜力、风险与六维评分。\n② 用户提供项目 X 用户名，即可获得一份可执行研究评分卡。

① 每小时汇总主流市场结构、真实一小时成交额排名、公开叙事与风险事件，适合快速了解市场状态。
② 用户无需提供参数。

① 为单个币种整合最近完整小时的价格、成交活跃度、主动买卖、杠杆环境、基本面与公开新闻线索。
② 用户提供一个支持的币种代码。

Returns recent AI-detected crypto token alerts based on multi-source on-chain and social activity convergence, for traders and researchers monitoring emerging opportunities.
No input required — optionally specify a result limit (1-50, default 10).

Analyzes authorized OpenAPI bundles for agent-service readiness, operation safety, ambiguity blockers, and evidence digests.
User provides an OpenAPI 3.0/3.1 JSON bundle and confirms they are authorized to transform it.

Executes any of 35+ tools -- code hosting, email, chat, docs, web search, data -- through one gateway with routing, retries, and logging; for agents holding their own provider API keys.
1. tool (qualified name) 2. params (per tool schema) 3. credentials with the tool's required fields (api_key for search; listed per tool in the free catalog); no key? use Managed Agent Task Execution

Hosted monetization for any HTTP API: register an upstream URL, price and payout wallet, and Pitchook serves it as a pay-per-call service agents buy with USDT on X Layer — settlement goes straight to the provider's wallet, and failed calls are never charged.
Providers supply their API base URL, per-call USDT price and an X Layer payout wallet (optionally upstream auth headers and per-route prices); buyers just need a funded wallet.

按关键词读取抖音 App 视频搜索 V2 结果，返回 business_data 列表、作者资料、播放源、标签、统计信息、cursor 和 has_more 等字段。
用户需提供：1. keyword；2. 可选 cursor、sort_type、publish_time、filter_duration、content_type、search_id、backtrace。

Read any public web page and return clean markdown, for AI agents doing research, monitoring and structured data extraction at scale.
Requires: url (the full page address to read).

Fetch Amazon product reviews for product research, sentiment analysis and competitor analysis. Async two-step: the first call starts collection and returns a snapshot id, the second call fetches the reviews.
Requires: asin (Amazon product id) or a product url, then pass snapshot (the returned id) to fetch results. Optional: max_reviews.

Fetch a public LinkedIn profile or company page as clean content via residential retrieval with JS rendering, for B2B research, lead enrichment and recruiting.
Requires: url (the public profile or company page URL).

Fetch an Amazon product page - title, price and details - via residential retrieval that handles bot protection and JS rendering, for price tracking and product research.
Requires: url (the Amazon product page URL).

Structured page extraction via residential retrieval with JS rendering: clean markdown plus links and headings as structured data, for RAG, crawling and content analysis.
Requires: url (the page URL to extract).

Fetch a public social profile or post as clean content via residential retrieval with JS rendering, for social listening, sentiment and influencer research.
Requires: url (the public profile or post URL).

Read up to 5 URLs in one call and return clean markdown for each, via residential retrieval with JS rendering, for bulk RAG ingestion and multi-source research.
Requires: urls (up to 5 URLs as a comma-separated list or JSON array).

Search Amazon by keyword and get a structured product list with ASIN, brand, price, rating, reviews, Best Sellers Rank and seller. Async two-step.
Requires: keyword to start, then snapshot (the returned id) to fetch results. Optional: limit.

Get Amazon Best Sellers for a category on any marketplace: ranked products with ASIN, title, brand, price, rating and Best Sellers Rank. Async two-step.
Requires: category_url to start, then snapshot (the returned id) to fetch results. Optional: limit.

提供面向 AI Agent、交易助手和研究工具的加密市场上下文数据，覆盖山寨币永续资金费率/OI 情绪、稳定币流动性、DeFi TVL、BTC 周期估值和宏观风险信号。
调用者需要提供查询范围或指标名称，例如 latest、macro、alt_perp、stablecoin_chains、btc_cycle；可选提供时间范围和输出格式。

Returns the latest recent stored one-minute OHLCV bar for up to 100 U.S. equity symbols at no charge.
Provide one symbol or a comma-separated symbol list and an optional adjustment mode.

Returns the enabled U.S. equity symbols available from this data service for agents that need to discover supported market coverage.
No input is required.

Returns one bounded page of historical one-minute or daily U.S. equity OHLCV bars after final payment settlement.
Provide symbol, interval, from, to, and optional adjustment and limit.

一次支付获得 1000 次 Clawby 实时金融数据 API 调用额度:覆盖美股与期权、加密货币、衍生品、DEX 与 meme 币、预测市场、社交舆情、SEC 财报及 75+ 链 RPC 共 280+ 接口,适合需要实时行情与链上数据的 AI agent。
需提供:1. 你的 Clawby API Key(置于请求头;未注册时按接入指引用钱包签名自动注册) 2. X Layer 网络的 USDT 支付(按报价完成) 3. 支付成功后获得完整 skill 安装方式,未安装过 Clawby skill 则自动化执行安装,api/mcp/onboard 接口也可查询到完整安装方式。

Centralized exchanges ranked by trust score, the spot-volume leaderboard, and the top derivatives venues by open interest, fused into a venue due-diligence board.
No parameters required; returns a single JSON report.

① 提供最近 30 天全球宏观与风险市场数据，覆盖美股指数、VIX、美债收益率、CPI、PCE、就业、市场宽度、情绪、加密指标、MSTR mNAV、Fed 概率和经济日历。
② 调用方无需提供参数；直接调用即可获得结构化 JSON，包含最新值、30 天历史序列、更新时间和高重要性经济事件。

Heuristic World Cup prediction-market wallet signals from large public trades and 7-day leaderboard stats; data only.
世界杯预测市场聪明钱雷达：大额成交与7日盈利钱包信号。输入 market 关键词（如 winner、队名或 all）+ limit 1-10。

Heuristic Polymarket wallet signals from recent large trades; topic search with limited coverage per call.
Polymarket 全市场聪明钱雷达。输入 market/topic 关键词（如 bitcoin 或 all）+ limit 1-10；数据信号，非投资建议。

Flags where 24h prediction-market probability moves diverge from 24h OKX spot momentum on major crypto assets.
事件概率与币价背离雷达：PM 24h 概率变动 vs OKX 现货 24h 动量。输入 asset（bitcoin/ethereum/solana 或省略查主流）。

Blends OKX spot momentum, perp funding/premium and Polymarket drift into risk_on/off/neutral/mixed with explainable score.
加密市场状态雷达：现货动量+资金费率+PM 情绪 → risk_on/off/neutral 及 0-100 分。输入 focus/asset 关键词 + limit。

Flags profitable wallets entering low-probability World Cup outcomes; potential upset positioning signals only.
世界杯冷门预警：盈利钱包涌入低概率赛果。输入 market 关键词（winner/队名/all）+ limit 1-10；数据信号，非投注建议。

Quick rule-based token research gate; optional DEX liquidity scan for EVM contracts; returns avoid/watch/research buckets.
代币快速尽调闸门：规则引擎输出 avoid/观望/可研究等分桶；EVM 合约可查 DEX 流动性。输入 asset（ticker 或合约地址）。

Read-only eligible/watch/skip gate before a Polymarket order; checks liquidity, price zone, and spread. eligible ≠ buy tip; does not place orders.
预测市场下单前检查：eligible/观望/跳过，只读不下单。eligible 表示机械检查通过，不是买入建议。输入 market_url 或 slug + side(yes/no)，可选 size_usd。

Football-ready event evidence card: same-event market matrix, fixture-aware tradability, and football/tennis category depth when available. Not a buy tip.
预测市场事件解读卡（Football-ready）：同场矩阵、赛程/fixture 可交易性，足球/网球品类深度可选。输入 market_url 或 slug；不下单。

A highly advanced, multi-modal crypto narrative intelligence engine. It pulls live market data and news to generate structured, actionable market intelligence, providing proprietary scores, market psychology analysis, and trading setups.
Input required: target asset or query parameters.

Real-time on-chain prediction-market odds and probability data across crypto, sports, and event markets, returned as JSON for agents and apps that need live outcome probabilities.
Optional query params: 1. marketId for one market 2. slug for one market by slug 3. category to filter the list 4. limit for list size. Send none for the full live market list.

Summary: Real-time trading signal scanner that monitors OKX, Binance, and Bybit spot markets to surface actionable crypto opportunities.

Input requirements:
- No required inputs. The scanner runs autonomously and returns current signals.
- Optional: specify a trading pair (e.g. BTC/USDT) or exchange filter (okx, binance, bybit) to narrow results.

Output: A ranked list of trading signals with entry price, signal strength, and source exchange.

One almanac per day, generated from live market signals: Fear & Greed index, ETH gas, X-mention hot tokens and social sentiment. Returns a fortune score, bilingual DO/AVOID list where every entry cites the data that triggered it, plus a lucky token and daily mantra. Billed per day from a prepaid payment channel - close it anytime and the unused deposit refunds automatically.
1. no input needed - just call once per day

Returns a bottom or top verdict (strong_buy, buy, sell, neutral) and a -100 to +100 score for any crypto coin, aggregating 20+ technical indicators across daily, weekly and monthly timeframes, and ranks which coins are currently at a bottom or top. For trading agents that need market-timing signals.
Provide: a coin symbol for a single-coin verdict, or nothing for a market-wide bottom/top scan.

1. Returns the available OpenNews source and category tree for search filtering.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: no required fields.

1. Searches market news with keyword, category, coin, score, and pagination filters.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: no required fields; optional: q, engineTypes, coins, hasCoin, score, page, limit.

1. Fetches Twitter/X profile metadata, follower stats, verification status, and avatar data by username.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: username.

1. Fetches Twitter/X profile metadata, follower stats, verification status, and avatar data by user ID.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: userId.

1. Fetches account tweets with text, metrics, media, links, mentions, and conversation data.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: username; optional: product, maxResults, includeReplies, includeRetweets.

1. Searches Twitter/X content by keyword, topic, user filters, engagement metrics, dates, and language.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: no required fields; optional: searchType, keywords, fromUser, toUser, mentionUser, hashtag, excludeReplies, excludeRetweets, minLikes, minRetweets, minReplies, sinceDate, untilDate, lang, product, maxResults, cursor.

1. Analyzes KOL follower data and social influence for a Twitter/X account.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: username.

1. Fetches Twitter/X article metadata and content by article ID.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: id.

1. Fetches tweet text, author data, engagement metrics, media, and context by tweet ID.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: id.

1. Fetches quote tweets with author data, engagement metrics, and result count controls.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: id; optional: maxResults.

1. Fetches users who retweeted a tweet and returns pagination cursor data.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: id; optional: cursor.

Real-time stablecoin market snapshot.
Total market cap, yield-bearing share, asset mix, chain distribution and market-wide APY stats for a quick market pulse.
Give me a stablecoin market overview

Stablecoin market trends over time.
Time-series of stablecoin market cap, APY and distribution, with an optional time range, for trend and time-series analysis.
Show stablecoin market cap trend over 90 days

Ranked yield picks with reasons and risk flags.
Top-N stablecoin picks over Barker's DeFi yield index (500+ protocols): risk-band TVL floor, APY sanity cap, data-derived reasons + risk flags per pick.
Where should I park 10k USDC right now, low risk?

Per-pool APY/TVL time series.
7-180 day series for trend and volatility analysis of one pool_uid.
Is this pool's APY stable over 30 days?
